title: geophila obvallata
intro: Geophila obvallata, also known as creeping Jenny or money plant, is a low-growing, herbaceous perennial plant native to Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, Geophila obvallata is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to take advantage of its potential medicinal properties.
